sourceMovie.title: Knox Goes Away
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Knox Goes Away (2024) stuck because it commits to its action premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Michael Keaton's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The action and crime blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Run All Night
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Knox Goes Away clicked for you, Run All Night (2015) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and crime, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Knox Goes Away?
faq.answer: Try Run All Night, The Jackal, Memory—each shares DNA with Knox Goes Away while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Knox Goes Away?
faq.answer: Knox Goes Away (2024) is best described as Action, Crime, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Knox Goes Away worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.0/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
